lesson: A wedge with an inclination of angle θ rests next to a wall. Two spheres are on the incline surface and are connected by a light string, as shown. The lower sphere has mass m2 and is sliding down the incline surface, pulling the upper sphere of mass m1. There is no friction between any of the surfaces, and the string is massless. Take g = 9.8 m/s^2. (a) Find atotal, the magnitude of the acceleration of the two spheres. (b) Find T, the tension in the string.
